start.additional_instructions: Greet and ask what the user wants: proceed to baseline, explore, or close. No question to display.

explore.additional_instructions: Answer the user's questions about the system. When they indicate ready for baseline or close, set the corresponding intent flag. Use the same phase_instructions and question_at_hand as provided; do not advance.

administerBaseline1.additional_instructions: This is phase1. Answer the questions naturally.
questions: QA4: what is your phone number?
QA8: what is your zip code?

administerBaseline2.additional_instructions: This is phase2. Answer the questions naturally.
questions: QB3: what is your zip code?

administerBaseline3.additional_instructions: This is phase3. Answer the questions naturally.
questions: QC4: what is your phone number?
QC8: what is your zip code?

close.additional_instructions: Ask for confirmation to end. If the user confirms, deliver the closing line. If they want to explore or go back, set the appropriate intent so the orchestrator can restore the previous phase and question_at_hand.
